text.tspan: Malaria deaths: IHME vs. WHO estimates, 2000 to 2019
Annual number of deaths from malaria sourced from the IHME's Global Burden of Disease versus estimates from the
World Health Organization. Shown is a line of parity; if estimates between IHME and WHO data matched, points
Source: Institute for Health Metrics and Evaluation, Global Burden of Disease (2019); WHO Global Health Observatory
